binary_checks: Did the answer identify cross-layer mass-restart recovery throughput, especially compute control-plane and storage reconciliation as the main bottleneck, not merely a symptom or generic concern?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as compute-recovery throughput, storage-state reconciliation, cross-layer observability, and facility protection settings?
Did the top intervention target mass-restart recovery behavior across compute and storage directly?
Did the answer avoid generic distractors such as communications, generic capacity expansion, or electrical-fault-only explanations?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
